title: Homepage loads and shows core hero content over the 3D background
description: Verifies the landing page loads successfully and renders visible hero/overlay content on top of the animated background.

steps.description: Verify element "Primary call-to-action button" is visible
Verify element "Ocean background canvas" is visible

title: Insights carousel renders multiple insight cards from the live insights source
description: Verifies the insights carousel displays an ordered list of insight items when the insights data is available.

steps.description: Verify element "First insight card" is visible
Click on "Next" in the insights carousel
Verify element "Second insight card" is visible
Click on "Next" in the insights carousel
Verify element "Third insight card" is visible

title: Insights carousel supports backward navigation without breaking layout
description: Verifies the user can navigate forward and backward in the insights carousel and still see valid cards.

steps.description: Click on "Next" in the insights carousel
Verify element "Active insight card" is visible
Click on "Previous" in the insights carousel
Verify element "Active insight card" is visible

title: Smooth scroll behavior works across homepage sections
description: Verifies the Lenis smooth scroll provider allows scrolling to lower sections and content remains visible.

steps.description: Verify element "Therapy information section" is visible

title: 3D background remains present while scrolling through content
description: Verifies the WebGL ocean background canvas remains visible/present as the user scrolls through overlay sections.

steps.description: Verify element "Ocean background canvas" is visible
Verify element "Ocean background canvas" is visible
Verify element "Ocean background canvas" is visible

title: Homepage gracefully handles slow initial rendering (no blank screen)
description: Verifies that during initial load the user sees visible overlay content and does not get stuck on a blank page.

steps.description: Verify element "Primary call-to-action button" is visible
Wait for element "Insights carousel" to appear
Verify element "Ocean background canvas" is visible

title: Book a session on an allowed day (Sunday/Monday) with live slot list visible
description: Verifies that the booking calendar allows selecting Sunday/Monday and displays available time slots with therapist selection controls.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where the booking calendar is displayed
Verify text "Select a date" is visible
Click on the date picker control
Select a Sunday date in the date picker
Verify text "Available time slots" is visible
Verify at least one time slot option is visible
Verify a therapist selection control is visible

title: Date picker blocks selection of disallowed days (non-Sunday/non-Monday)
description: Verifies the date picker prevents choosing dates that are not Sunday or Monday.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where the booking calendar is displayed
Click on the date picker control
Attempt to select a Tuesday date in the date picker
Verify text "Only Sundays and Mondays" is visible
Verify text "Available time slots" is not visible
Verify text "Please select a Sunday or Monday" is visible

title: Changing the date refreshes the slot list and recommendations
description: Verifies that switching between two allowed dates updates the visible slots and recommended slots section.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where the booking calendar is displayed
Click on the date picker control
Select a Sunday date in the date picker
Click on the date picker control
Select a Monday date in the date picker
Verify text "Available time slots" is visible
Verify at least one time slot option is visible

title: Real-time availability updates a visible slot list after waiting on the page
description: Verifies that the slot availability section remains live and updates while the user stays on the calendar page (WebSocket-driven UX).

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where the booking calendar is displayed
Select a Sunday date in the date picker
Verify text "Available time slots" is visible
Verify at least one time slot option is visible
Verify text "Available time slots" is visible
Verify at least one time slot option is visible

title: Apply a valid percentage coupon and verify discounted total before payment
description: Verifies a valid percentage coupon is accepted and the UI shows the discounted amount in the booking/payment summary.

title: Apply a valid fixed-amount coupon and verify discounted total before payment
description: Verifies a valid fixed discount coupon is accepted and the UI reflects the reduced price.

title: Reject an invalid coupon code and prevent continuing with discount
description: Verifies an invalid coupon shows an error message and does not apply any discount.

title: Reject an expired coupon and surface expiry error
description: Verifies an expired coupon is blocked and the UI clearly indicates the coupon is expired.

title: Reject an inactive coupon and do not apply discount
description: Verifies a coupon flagged inactive is rejected with an appropriate error message.

steps.description: Verify text "Coupon is not active" is visible

title: Handle coupon max-uses reached and block coupon application
description: Verifies a fully used coupon is rejected and the UI indicates it has no remaining uses.

steps.description: Verify text "Coupon usage limit reached" is visible

title: Proceed to booking after valid coupon and verify confirmation reflects discount
description: Verifies the user can complete the booking flow with an applied coupon and sees confirmation that indicates the discount was applied.

title: Attempt to apply coupon with empty input and show validation message
description: Verifies the UI validates empty coupon submissions and does not call coupon application successfully.

steps.description: Verify text "Enter a coupon code" is visible

title: Paid session checkout opens Razorpay payment modal from booking flow
description: Verifies that a user can start a paid session booking and is taken into the Razorpay payment step from the UI.

steps.description: Verify text "Pay" or "Proceed to payment" is visible.

title: Do not allow continuing to confirmation without completing payment
description: Verifies that the UI does not present the booking as confirmed unless payment has completed successfully.

steps.description: Verify text "Booking confirmed" is not visible.

title: Profile page loads and shows bookings sections
description: Verifies the user can open the profile page and see upcoming/past bookings areas populated or empty-state messaging.

title: Cancel an upcoming booking from profile page
description: Verifies a user can cancel one of their upcoming bookings and sees confirmation with the booking removed from the upcoming list.

steps.description: Click on "Cancel" for the first upcoming booking
Click on "Confirm" in the cancellation confirmation dialog
Verify the cancelled booking is no longer visible in the "Upcoming" list

title: Cancellation is reflected immediately on the profile page without a manual refresh
description: Verifies that after cancelling a booking, the profile view updates in-place to reflect the cancellation result.

steps.description: Click on "Cancel" for the first upcoming booking
Click on "Confirm" in the cancellation confirmation dialog
Verify the cancelled booking card is not visible in the list of upcoming bookings

title: Cancel flow can be dismissed from confirmation dialog
description: Verifies that a user can back out of cancelling a booking and the booking remains unchanged.

steps.description: Click on "Cancel" for the first upcoming booking
Click on "Close" or "No" in the confirmation dialog
Verify the booking is still visible in the "Upcoming" list

title: Attempt to cancel a booking not owned by the user shows authorization error
description: Verifies the UI shows an authorization error message when the backend rejects cancellation with a 403 Forbidden.

steps.description: Click on "Cancel" for a booking entry that indicates it cannot be modified (not owned / restricted) if present
Click on "Confirm" in the cancellation confirmation dialog

title: Profile page handles empty bookings state gracefully
description: Verifies that when the user has no upcoming or past bookings, the profile page shows clear empty-state messaging.

steps.description: Verify text "No upcoming bookings" is visible
Verify text "No past bookings" is visible

title: Past bookings are displayed and cannot be cancelled
description: Verifies past bookings appear under the Past section and do not offer an active cancellation action.

steps.description: Verify at least one past booking card is visible
Verify element "Cancel" is not visible within a past booking card

title: Admin user can access the Admin dashboard and see key metrics
description: Verifies an allowlisted admin can open the Admin dashboard and view all required metric labels/values.

steps.description: Verify text "Total paid bookings" is visible

title: Admin dashboard shows estimated revenue metric
description: Verifies the Admin dashboard includes the estimated revenue metric and displays a visible value.

steps.description: Click on the "Dashboard" link in the admin area
Verify element "Estimated revenue value" is visible

title: Non-admin user is blocked from viewing Admin dashboard (403/Not authorized UI)
description: Verifies a signed-in but non-allowlisted user cannot access the Admin dashboard content.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link in the site navigation

title: Create a new insight card as admin and verify it appears in the insights list
description: Verifies an admin can create a new insight card via the Admin Insights UI and see it appear in the insights listing.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Type "E2E Insight Title" into the Title field
Type "E2E Insight Description" into the Description field
Type "https://example.com/media.jpg" into the Media URL field
Select "image" from the Media Type dropdown
Type "999" into the Sort Order field
Verify text "E2E Insight Title" is visible

title: Edit an existing insight card and verify updated content is shown
description: Verifies an admin can edit an existing insight card and the updated title/description is visible afterwards.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Click on the first insight card row or list item
Type "E2E Insight Title (Updated)" into the Title field
Type "E2E Insight Description (Updated)" into the Description field
Verify text "E2E Insight Title (Updated)" is visible

title: Validation: attempt to create an insight without a title and verify an error is shown
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents creating an insight when the title is missing.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Type "E2E Description only" into the Description field

title: Validation: enter an invalid media URL and verify an error is shown
description: Verifies the form blocks saving when the Media URL is invalid and shows a visible error state/message.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Type "E2E Invalid Media URL" into the Title field
Type "not-a-url" into the Media URL field

title: Sort order: create two insights with different sort orders and verify higher priority appears first
description: Verifies sort order affects visible ordering in the Admin Insights list (lower sort order first, or as specified by the UI).

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Type "E2E Sort A" into the Title field
Type "1" into the Sort Order field
Verify text "E2E Sort A" is visible
Type "E2E Sort B" into the Title field
Type "2" into the Sort Order field
Verify text "E2E Sort B" is visible
Verify text "E2E Sort A" is visible

title: Non-admin user is blocked from using Admin Insights UI
description: Verifies a non-admin account cannot access or operate the Admin Insights page and is shown an access denied state.

steps.description: Type "nonadmin.user@example.com" into the email or username field

title: Insights appear on the homepage carousel after admin creates one
description: Verifies that after creating an insight in admin, the same insight is visible on the homepage insights carousel.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Type "E2E Home Carousel Insight" into the Title field
Type "Carousel visibility check" into the Description field
Verify text "E2E Home Carousel Insight" is visible
Verify text "E2E Home Carousel Insight" is visible

title: Homepage loads insights carousel with fetched ordered items
description: Verifies the homepage renders the insights carousel content when the backend returns an ordered insights list.

steps.description: Verify element "Pause" or "Play" (auto-rotate control) is visible.

title: Carousel advances to next slide using Next control
description: Verifies a user can move forward through insight cards via the Next control.

steps.description: Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.
Click on "Next" in the insights carousel controls.
Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.
Verify text "Slide" is visible in the carousel status/label (for example, an indicator showing position).

title: Carousel moves to previous slide using Previous control
description: Verifies a user can move backward through insight cards via the Previous control.

steps.description: Click on "Next" in the insights carousel controls.
Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.
Click on "Previous" in the insights carousel controls.
Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.

title: Keyboard navigation: Right Arrow advances the carousel
description: Verifies the carousel supports keyboard navigation to move to the next insight card.

steps.description: Click on the currently visible insight card (carousel slide) to focus the carousel region.
Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.
Verify text "Slide" is visible in the carousel status/label (for example, an indicator showing position).

title: Keyboard navigation: Left Arrow moves the carousel backward
description: Verifies the carousel supports keyboard navigation to move to the previous insight card.

steps.description: Click on the currently visible insight card (carousel slide) to focus the carousel region.
Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.

title: Auto-rotate advances slides over time when enabled
description: Verifies the carousel automatically rotates to another insight card after waiting, indicating auto-rotate is functioning.

steps.description: Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.
Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.
Verify text "Slide" is visible in the carousel status/label (for example, an indicator showing position).

title: Pause auto-rotate stops slide movement
description: Verifies that pausing the carousel prevents automatic slide changes during the wait period.

steps.description: Click on "Pause" in the insights carousel controls.
Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.

title: Resume auto-rotate continues slide movement
description: Verifies that resuming the carousel allows automatic slide changes again.

steps.description: Click on "Pause" in the insights carousel controls.
Click on "Play" in the insights carousel controls.
Verify element "active carousel slide" is visible.

title: Open Blog index page and confirm it renders the blog listing
description: Verifies the static Blog index page loads and displays expected blog index content.

steps.description: Verify element "Blog posts list" is visible

title: Navigate from Blog index to 'Anonymous Therapy Benefits' article via in-page link
description: Verifies a user can open a specific blog article from the blog index and see the article content.

steps.description: Verify element "Blog posts list" is visible
Click on the blog post link "Anonymous Therapy Benefits"

title: Directly load the 'Anonymous Therapy Benefits' article URL
description: Verifies the static blog article page loads via direct URL entry and shows the expected article structure.

title: Non-existent blog article shows a 404 page
description: Verifies navigating to a non-existent static blog article displays a user-visible 404 state.

title: Blog index page header navigation is present and usable
description: Verifies the blog index includes visible site navigation controls for consistent user experience.

steps.description: Click on "Home" in the header navigation

title: Blog article page provides a way to return to the blog index
description: Verifies a user reading an article can return to the blog index using an on-page link.

steps.description: Click on "Blog" or "Back to Blog" link on the page
Verify element "Blog posts list" is visible

title: Load FAQ page and verify core FAQ content is visible
description: Verifies the static FAQ page loads successfully and shows the FAQ heading and at least one question item.

steps.description: Verify element "a FAQ question item" is visible

title: Expand a FAQ question to reveal its answer
description: Verifies a user can expand a question and the answer becomes visible.

steps.description: Verify element "a collapsed FAQ question" is visible
Verify element "the answer for that question" is visible

title: Collapse an expanded FAQ question to hide its answer
description: Verifies a user can collapse an expanded question and the answer is no longer shown.

steps.description: Verify element "the answer for that question" is visible
Click on "the same expanded FAQ question"
Verify element "the answer for that question" is not visible

title: Expand multiple FAQ questions and verify each answer appears under the correct question
description: Verifies multiple FAQ items can be expanded and their answers are visible (no backend calls).

steps.description: Click on "the first collapsed FAQ question"
Verify element "the first question's answer" is visible
Click on "a different collapsed FAQ question"
Verify element "the second question's answer" is visible

title: Keyboard accessibility: expand a FAQ question using Enter key
description: Verifies an FAQ question can be expanded using keyboard interaction for accessibility.

steps.description: Verify element "the answer for that question" is visible

title: Long FAQ content: expand a question below the fold after scrolling
description: Verifies that FAQ items further down the page can be expanded after scrolling.

steps.description: Scroll to "a FAQ question near the bottom of the page"
Verify element "a collapsed FAQ question near the bottom" is visible
Verify element "the answer for that question" is visible

title: FAQ page stability: rapid toggle does not break rendering
description: Verifies repeatedly toggling an FAQ item keeps the UI responsive and the content still renders correctly.

steps.description: Click on "the same expanded FAQ question"
Click on "the same collapsed FAQ question"
Verify element "the answer for that question" is visible

title: Service worker script is available and can be fetched (200)
description: Verifies the PWA service worker file is reachable in a production-like environment and returns content.

title: Service worker script is not available (404) scenario handling
description: Verifies the user-visible outcome when the service worker script is missing and PWA registration cannot occur.

title: User can toggle from dark to light and see visible UI change
description: Verifies toggling the theme updates visible UI state to light mode without navigation or reload.

title: User can toggle from light to dark and see visible UI change
description: Verifies toggling the theme updates visible UI state to dark mode without navigation or reload.

title: Theme toggle remains usable after scrolling (no visual regressions)
description: Verifies the theme toggle continues to work after the user scrolls the page content.

title: Theme toggle does not navigate away from the current page
description: Verifies clicking the theme toggle changes theme state without changing the URL.

title: Payment success page loads and shows confirmation UI
description: Verifies the payment success page renders a visible confirmation message and key booking/payment details after a successful payment flow redirect.

title: Payment success page displays a clear next step to reach bookings/sessions
description: Verifies the confirmation UI provides a visible call-to-action that helps the user proceed after payment success.

steps.description: Verify element "Go to sessions" is visible
Verify element "Back to home" is visible

title: Payment success page is stable on refresh and continues to show confirmation UI
description: Verifies the success page can be reloaded without breaking and still shows confirmation content.

title: Payment success page does not show failure messaging
description: Verifies that the success page does not incorrectly display payment failure text or prompts.

steps.description: Verify text "verification failed" is not visible
Verify text "Try again" is not visible

title: Payment success page shows a unique reference/identifier when present
description: Verifies that a reference like payment ID, order ID, or booking ID is visible on the success page when the UI provides it.

title: Payment success page provides a visible way to contact support/help
description: Verifies the user can find help/support guidance from the success screen in case of questions after payment confirmation.

title: SEO meta title is present on the home page
description: Verifies the home page includes a visible title for SEO (page title shown by the browser).

title: Negative check: detect missing or blank page title (SEO regression)
description: Validates that the page title is not empty and contains a meaningful brand string to prevent SEO warnings.

title: Verify no UI surface exists for background schedulers (cleanup/reminders)
description: Confirms the application does not expose any end-user UI to trigger or view background scheduler jobs.

title: Display recommended time slots for an eligible date and allow user to pick one
description: Verifies that recommended slots are shown for a valid booking date and a user can select a recommended slot to proceed toward booking.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where you can choose a date and view available time slots.
Select an upcoming Sunday date in the date picker.
Verify text "Recommended" is visible near the time slots area.
Verify element "Recommended time slots list" is visible.
Click on the first visible recommended time slot.
Verify text "Selected" is visible for the chosen recommended slot.

title: Recommendations update when the user changes the selected date
description: Verifies that switching to a different eligible date refreshes the recommended slots shown on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where you can choose a date and view available time slots.
Select an upcoming Sunday date in the date picker.
Verify element "Recommended time slots list" is visible.
Select a different upcoming Monday date in the date picker.
Verify element "Recommended time slots list" is visible.
Verify text "Recommended" is visible near the time slots area.
Click on any visible recommended time slot.

title: Fallback to raw available slots when recommendations service fails
description: Verifies that if recommendations cannot be loaded, the UI still shows raw available slots for the selected date.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where you can choose a date and view available time slots.
Select an upcoming Sunday date in the date picker.
Verify element "Available time slots list" is visible.
Verify text "Recommended" is not visible in the time slots area.
Verify text "Showing available slots" is visible.
Click on the first visible available time slot.

title: Graceful empty-state when no recommended slots are returned
description: Verifies that when recommendations return no items, the UI communicates this clearly and still allows selection from available slots if present.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where you can choose a date and view available time slots.
Select an upcoming Sunday date in the date picker.
Verify text "No recommended slots" is visible.
Verify element "Available time slots list" is visible.
Click on the first visible available time slot.
Verify text "Selected" is visible for the chosen slot.

title: Prevent booking-date selection outside Sunday/Monday and avoid showing recommendations
description: Verifies that selecting a non-allowed weekday does not show recommended slots and the UI indicates the date restriction.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where you can choose a date and view available time slots.
Select an upcoming Tuesday date in the date picker.
Verify text "Bookings are only available on Sundays and Mondays" is visible.
Verify element "Recommended time slots list" is not visible.
Verify element "Available time slots list" is not visible.
Select an upcoming Sunday date in the date picker.
Verify element "Recommended time slots list" is visible.

title: Recommended slot selection persists when scrolling within the slots section
description: Verifies that after selecting a recommended slot, scrolling does not clear the selection and the user can continue.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where you can choose a date and view available time slots.
Select an upcoming Monday date in the date picker.
Verify element "Recommended time slots list" is visible.
Click on the first visible recommended time slot.
Verify text "Selected" is visible for the chosen recommended slot.
Scroll to the bottom of the time slots section.
Verify text "Selected" is still visible for the previously chosen slot.

title: User can switch from a recommended slot to a different recommended slot before continuing
description: Verifies that selecting a second recommended slot updates the selection to the new slot and the UI reflects the change.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where you can choose a date and view available time slots.
Select an upcoming Sunday date in the date picker.
Verify element "Recommended time slots list" is visible.
Click on the first visible recommended time slot.
Verify text "Selected" is visible for the first chosen slot.
Click on a different visible recommended time slot.
Verify text "Selected" is visible for the second chosen slot.

title: Show a clear loading state while recommendations are being fetched
description: Verifies that the UI indicates progress while recommended slots are loading and then renders the recommended list.

steps.description: Navigate to the booking page where you can choose a date and view available time slots.
Select an upcoming Monday date in the date picker.
Wait for the time slots area to finish loading.
Verify element "Recommended time slots list" is visible.
Verify text "Loading recommendations" is not visible.
